heroTitle: Computer, Printer, Macbook, Home Appliances & More Repair
heroDescription: Computer, Printer, Macbook, Home Appliances & More Repair
corporatePlanDesc: For large organizations with multiple locations, custom integrations, and dedicated support
premiumPlanDesc: All features unlimited — for professional workshops
startManaging: Start managing your repair business professionally
problemsSubtitle: Common challenges repair masters face daily
cashTrackingDesc: Not being able to track daily earnings and expenses from the cash register, leading to financial confusion and lost revenue.
customerManagementDesc: Difficulty managing customer information and tracking multiple repairs simultaneously, resulting in missed deadlines and unhappy clients.
smsNotificationDesc: Spending time calling customers about repair status updates instead of focusing on actual repairs, reducing productivity.
paperworkDesc: Losing repair information, customer details, or warranty documents due to disorganized paper records and manual tracking.
deviceConditionDesc: Not documenting the device condition and existing issues when customers bring them in, leading to disputes and customers not accepting responsibility later.
customerSelfServiceDesc: Customers can check status via QR code themselves, no calls needed
pickupFromHomeDesc: On-demand pickup service - customers can request device pickup from home
platformIntegrationsDesc: Integration with all necessary tools - payments, accounting, e-commerce
automaticNotificationsDesc: Automatic SMS and informing calls - no need to call customers manually
scalableTechStackDesc: Modern tech stack, multi-tenant ready, API-first approach, cloud-native
premiumPaymentNote: Payment required if you choose Premium plan
photoUploadInfo: JPEG, PNG or WebP format, max 5MB. Up to 4 photos.

referralBonusInfo: 50,000 UZS bonus is credited when your referral creates their first repair
problems_title: Running a repair shop is chaos without the right tools
problems_desc: From cash flow to customer records — these 4 problems drain your business every day
p1_desc: Without tracking daily income and expenses, you lose visibility into your finances and money disappears.
p1_fix: Digital cash register with daily PDF reports
p2_desc: Managing customer information and tracking multiple repairs at once is difficult, leading to missed deadlines.
p3_desc: Customers call every day asking 'is it ready?' This wastes your time and frustrates both sides.
p4_desc: Without documenting the device condition when received, customers dispute what was wrong, causing conflicts.
features_title: Everything you need to run a modern repair shop
features_desc: Complete tools to simplify repair operations and improve customer service.
f1_desc: Simple customer intake form, manage repair services, and track status in real-time.
f2_desc: Generate unique QR codes for each repair. Customers scan to check status anytime.
f3_desc: Send automatic SMS: received, diagnostics ready, repair complete — no manual work.
f4_desc: Track daily income — cash, Payme, Click. Generate daily PDF reports automatically.
f5_desc: Customers check repair status themselves via QR or link. No phone calls needed.
f6_desc: Receive daily business stats via Telegram: repairs completed, revenue, customer count.
cta_title: Ready to run your shop like a pro?
cta_desc: Join 2,500+ repair shop owners who already use pMaster. Free to start, takes 5 minutes to set up.
footer_desc: pMaster - Repair shop CRM designed for the Uzbekistan market. Streamline operations and grow your business.
footer_made: Made with care for repair shop owners worldwide.
how_desc: Transform your repair shop in 3 simple steps
s1_desc: Fill out the intake form, photograph the device, and document the issue.
s2_desc: Enter diagnostic results, set price, and send SMS notification to customer.
s3_desc: Complete the repair, get daily report in PDF or via Telegram.
devices_desc: pMaster can manage repairs for any type of electronics and home appliances
a1: Yes, pMaster offers a free plan with basic features. Premium plans are available with additional capabilities.
a2: Yes, all data is encrypted and securely stored on Supabase. We comply with GDPR and Uzbekistan data regulations.
a3: pMaster is integrated with Click and Payme - the most popular payment systems in Uzbekistan.
a4: Yes, pMaster works as a PWA (Progressive Web App). You can use it directly in your mobile browser.
a5: Yes, we support you 24/7 via Telegram and email. Request new features - we'll add them.
q6: Can I switch to another provider?
a6: Of course! You can export all your data in CSV/XLSX format.
q7: Is it available in other languages?
a7: Yes, pMaster is available in Uzbek, Russian, and English. You can change the language in settings.
q8: What does the Telegram bot do?
a8: The Telegram bot sends daily reports, customer notifications, and business statistics.
hero_title: The smartest way to run your repair shop
hero_sub: Free cloud-based CRM that helps repair shops track orders, notify customers automatically, and manage daily finances — all from any device.
